---
title: ""
output:
  html_document:
    theme: null
    toc: false
---

<style>
html,body{
margin:0;
padding:0;
width:100%;
background:#E3F2FD;
font-family:Arial,sans-serif;
}

/* R Markdown の余白を削除 */
.main-container{
max-width:100% !important;
width:100% !important;
margin:0 !important;
padding:0 !important;
}

/* ヘッダー */
header{
width: 100%;
background: #0055b3; 
color: #ffffff;
text-align: center;
padding: 60px 20px;
box-sizing: border-box;
border-bottom: 3px solid #00d4ff;
}

header h1 {
margin: 0;
font-size: 42px;
font-weight: 700;
letter-spacing: 2px;
}

header p {
margin: 12px 0 0 0;
font-size: 18px;
color: #e2e8f0;
font-weight: 300;
letter-spacing: 1px;
}

/* ナビ */
nav {
width: 100%;
background: #0055b3; 
display: flex;
justify-content: center;
flex-wrap: wrap;
position: sticky;
top: 0;
z-index: 1000;
box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
}

nav a {
color: #e2e8f0;
text-decoration: none;
padding: 18px 28px;
font-weight: 500;
font-size: 15px;
transition: all 0.3s ease;
position: relative;
}

nav a:hover {
color: #ffffff;
background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
}

nav a.active {
color: #00d4ff;
font-weight: 700;
}

nav a.active::after {
content: '';
position: absolute;
bottom: 0;
left: 0;
width: 100%;
height: 3px;
background: #00d4ff;
}

/* -----------------------
   Hero Slider (カルーセル仕様に改修・大画面化)
----------------------- */
.hero{
width: 100%;
max-width: 1100px;
margin: 30px auto;
position: relative;
height: 600px;
overflow: hidden;
background: none;
}

#slider-track {
position: relative;
width: 100%;
height: 100%;
}

.slide {
position: absolute;
top: 50%;
left: 15%;
transform: translateY(-50%) scale(0.8);
width: 70%;
height: auto;
aspect-ratio: 7 / 5;
object-fit: cover;
border-radius: 14px;
transition: all 0.5s ease-in-out;
opacity: 0;
z-index: 0;
box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
}

/* 中央（現在）の画像 */
.slide.active {
left: 15%;
transform: translateY(-50%) scale(1);
opacity: 1;
z-index: 2;
}

/* 左（前）の画像 */
.slide.prev {
left: -10%;
transform: translateY(-50%) scale(0.85);
opacity: 0.5;
z-index: 1;
}

/* 右（次）の画像 */
.slide.next {
left: 40%;
transform: translateY(-50%) scale(0.85);
opacity: 0.5;
z-index: 1;
}

.arrow{
position:absolute;
top:50%;
transform:translateY(-50%);
width:52px;
height:52px;
border:none;
border-radius:50%;
background:rgba(0,0,0,.4);
color:white;
font-size:26px;
cursor:pointer;
transition:.2s;
z-index: 10;
}

.arrow:hover{
background:rgba(0,0,0,.7);
}

.arrow.left{
left:15px;
}

.arrow.right{
right:15px;
}

/* 本文 */
.container{
width:90%;
max-width:1200px;
margin:40px auto;
}

.card{
background:#fff;
padding:30px;
margin-bottom:30px;
border-radius:12px;
box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.08);
border-top:4px solid #0066cc;
}

.card h2{
margin-top:0;
color:#0066cc;
border-bottom:1px solid #ddd;
padding-bottom:10px;
}

.card p,
.card li{
line-height:1.8;
}

/* フッター */
footer{
background:#0055b3;
color:white;
text-align:center;
padding:25px;
}

header h1 a {
    text-decoration: none; /* 下線を消す */
    color: inherit;        /* 文字色を親要素に合わせる（黒など） */
}

/* リンクのホバー設定 */
.card a {
    color: #0066cc;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: color 0.3s ease;
}

.card a:hover {
    color: #00d4ff; /* ホバー時の水色 */
    text-decoration: underline;
}



/* スマホ対応 */
@media(max-width:768px){
header{ padding:40px 15px; }
header h1{ font-size:30px; }
nav{ flex-direction:column; }

.hero{ width: 100%; height: 250px; margin: 15px auto;}
.slide { width: 75%; height: auto; }
.slide.active { left: 12.5%; }
.slide.prev { left: -15%; }
.slide.next { left: 40%; }

.container{ width:95%; }
}
</style>

<header>
<h1><a href="index.html">鷹取研究室</a></h1>
<p>Wireless Communications & ISAC Laboratory</p>
</header>

<nav>
<a href="index.html" class="active">Home</a>
<a href="research.html">研究紹介</a>
<a href="members.html">メンバー</a>
<a href="equipment.html">研究設備</a>
<a href="publications.html">研究実績</a>
<a href="topics.html">Topics</a>
<a href="contact.html">Information</a>
</nav>

<div class="hero">
<div id="slider-track"></div>
<button class="arrow left" onclick="prevImage()">❮</button>
<button class="arrow right" onclick="nextImage()">❯</button>
</div>

<script>
var images = [
"IMG_6700.JPG",
"IMG_7560.JPG",
"IMG_7628.JPG",


];

var currentIndex = 0;
var track = document.getElementById("slider-track");

images.forEach(function(src) {
var img = document.createElement("img");
img.src = src;
img.className = "slide";
track.appendChild(img);
});

function updateSlider(){
var slides = document.querySelectorAll(".slide");

slides.forEach(function(slide, index) {
slide.className = "slide"; 

if (index === currentIndex) {
slide.classList.add("active");
} else if (index === (currentIndex - 1 + slides.length) % slides.length) {
slide.classList.add("prev"); 
} else if (index === (currentIndex + 1) % slides.length) {
slide.classList.add("next"); 
}
});
}

function nextImage() {
currentIndex = (currentIndex + 1) % images.length;
updateSlider();
}

function prevImage() {
currentIndex = (currentIndex - 1 + images.length) % images.length;
updateSlider();
}

updateSlider();
setInterval(nextImage, 10000);
</script>

<div class="container">

<div class="card">
<h2>研究室紹介    <span style="background: #e3f2fd; color: #0055b3; padding: 5px 10px; border-radius: 5px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #0055b3;">
    2025年4月 新設
  </span></h2>


<p>
本研究室では通信・レーダ融合技術（ISAC）、無線通信システム、信号処理に関する研究を行っています。
</p>
</div>


<div class="card">
<h2>研究分野</h2>
<ul>
<li>ISAC（Integrated Sensing and Communications）</li>
<li>OFDM・DFTs-OFDM</li>
<li>レーダ信号処理</li>
<li>MIMO・ビームフォーミング</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="card">
<h2>最新トピックス</h2>
  
  <!-- 1件目：#topic1 に飛ぶ -->
<div style="margin-bottom: 20px;">
<div style="color: #64748b; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500;">2026/07/08</div>
<a href="topics.html#topic1" class="hover-link">南山大学オープンキャンパスについて</a>
</div>

  <!-- 2件目：#topic2 に飛ぶ -->
<div style="margin-bottom: 20px;">
<div style="color: #64748b; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500;">2026/06/01</div>
<a href="topics.html#topic2" class="hover-link">ホームページ公開</a>
</div>

  <!-- 3件目：#topic3 に飛ぶ -->

<div style="margin-bottom: 20px;">
<div style="color: #64748b; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500;">2026/03/19</div>
<a href="topics.html#topic3" class="hover-link">優秀論文賞表彰</a>
  </div>

<div style="text-align: right; border-top: 1px solid #e2e8f0; padding-top: 10px;">
<a href="topics.html" style="font-size: 14px;">≫ 過去のトピックス一覧を見る</a>
  </div>
</div>

</div>

<footer>
&copy; 2026 Takatori Laboratory
</footer>
